description.en-US: Demonstrates how to consume the mass-of DataSource: load today's celebrations, branch on rite, and render variable slots via choice-rich-text. This is the same shape used by the actual Mass practice.
description.pt-BR: Demonstra como consumir a fonte de dados mass-of: carrega as celebrações de hoje, dispatcha por rito e renderiza slots variáveis via choice-rich-text.
